title: Capesize Spot Market On More Fragile Ground
section_path: Capesize Spot Market On More Fragile Ground
section_path_text: Capesize Spot Market On More Fragile Ground
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Overall dry bulk rates decreased last week, with the decline in capesize rates exceeding very small increases in the rest of the segments. Capesize rates ended last week at $24,652/day, which marked a week-on-week decline of $2,686 (-10%). Panamax rates ended at $15,427/day, which marked an increase of $321 (2%).
